categories.title: Features
list: Added support for deep search (can be turned off in settings)
Replaced Back button with Back to and Up to buttons
Added Drop In option to file context menu, which is the equivalent of drag-and-dropping the file into Blockbench
Added Open File Location option in file context menu
Display loading status and errors messages
Added support for more image extensions

categories.title: Fixes
list: Fixed broken context menu options which require shell access
